prompt.en:
**Problem**

**UML:**
Question 1: Class Alpha has a specialization/generalization relationship with Beta and Gamma. Alpha is an abstract class.
Question 16: Class Alfa has a 1-to-many aggregation relationship with Beta. Beta has an association with Gamma. Gamma has add() and remove() methods.
Question 30: Class Alfa has a 1-to-many aggregation relationship with Beta. Beta has an association with Gamma. Gamma has add() and remove() methods.
